Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[川崎市]][[高津区]]にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。 {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高津区の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高津区の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高津区の建築物|version=88345414}}
[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:高津区の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tachibana Shrine (Kawasaki City)]] [[sn:高津区の建築物]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q28199255}} [[Category:Architecture by Ward in Kawasaki City]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takatsu-ku, Kawasaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[川崎市]][[高津区]]にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。 {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高津区の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高津区の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高津区の建築物|version=88345414}}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q28199255)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
